description: Promotional content highlighting double-points loyalty rewards during specific dayparts, creating urgency through time-limited offers and value multiplication messaging.
structural_recipe: Feature loyalty program benefits with clear time window (من X إلى Y) and date range (من X إلى Z). Lead with morning greeting and emotional benefit (positive emoji, excitement markers). Emphasize point multiplication (دبل النقاط) and reward redemption value. Include call-to-action tied to meal/daypart preference. Use casual Arabic dialect with enthusiasm markers (😋✨🔥). Overlay specific dates and hours prominently.
why_it_works: Saudi consumers value direct financial incentives and point-based rewards that create compound value perception. Time-bound offers trigger FOMO (خصوصًا لما) and morning daypart targeting aligns with breakfast routine establishment. Double-multiplier messaging creates psychological pricing advantage compared to static discounts.
transplantation_caveats: Requires active loyalty program infrastructure to support double-points backend
Time specificity (6 AM - 11:30 AM) must align with actual operational capability
Point multiplication must be mathematically clear to avoid consumer trust issues
Date ranges should not overlap multiple campaigns to prevent confusion
